description: Contract-driven BotLens backend health dashboard. Assumes portal lifecycle/state tables plus observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1, observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1, and Loki backend logs are available in Grafana.

panels.title: Active Runs

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_lifecycle l WHERE COALESCE(l.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(l.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND l.status IN ('starting', 'running', 'degraded', 'telemetry_degraded', 'paused');

panels.description: Current runs with non-terminal lifecycle state.

panels.title: Active Viewers

targets.rawSql: WITH latest AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (COALESCE(m.run_id, '')) COALESCE(m.run_id, '') AS run_id, m.value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name = 'viewer_active_count'  AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')  ORDER BY COALESCE(m.run_id, ''), m.observed_at DESC ) SELECT COALESCE(sum(value), 0)::double precision AS value FROM latest;

panels.description: Latest active websocket viewers across selected runs.

panels.title: Viewer Send Failures

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(sum(m.value), 0)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name = 'viewer_send_fail_total'  AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') ;

panels.description: Total backend viewer send failures in the selected range.

panels.title: Recent Anomalies

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(count(*), 0)::double precision AS value FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 e WHERE $__timeFilter(e.observed_at) AND e.level IN ('WARN', 'ERROR')  AND COALESCE(e.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(e.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(e.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') ;

panels.description: Structured warn/error events in the selected range.

panels.title: Total Drop Counts By Seam

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN metric_name = 'telemetry_enqueue_drop_total' THEN 'telemetry_emit_queue' WHEN metric_name = 'symbol_fact_dropped_total' THEN 'symbol_fact_queue' WHEN metric_name = 'run_lifecycle_dropped_total' THEN 'run_lifecycle_queue' WHEN metric_name = 'run_notification_dropped_total' THEN 'run_notification_queue' WHEN metric_name = 'fanout_dropped_total' THEN 'fanout_channel' WHEN metric_name = 'bootstrap_superseded_total' THEN 'bootstrap_pending_slot' ELSE COALESCE(queue_name, metric_name) END AS metric, ROUND((sum(m.value))::numeric, 2)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('telemetry_enqueue_drop_total', 'symbol_fact_dropped_total', 'run_lifecycle_dropped_total', 'run_notification_dropped_total', 'fanout_dropped_total', 'bootstrap_superseded_total')  AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')   GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8;

panels.description: Totals for queue drops, overflow-style loss, and bootstrap supersedes.

panels.title: High-Level Latency Summary

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN metric_name = 'telemetry_transport_send_ms' THEN 'transport_send_ms p95' WHEN metric_name = 'ingest_decode_ms' THEN 'ingest_decode_ms p95' WHEN metric_name = 'ingest_route_ms' THEN 'ingest_route_ms p95' WHEN metric_name = 'symbol_projector_apply_ms' THEN 'symbol_projector_apply_ms p95' WHEN metric_name = 'run_projector_apply_ms' THEN 'run_projector_apply_ms p95' WHEN metric_name = 'fanout_delivery_ms' THEN 'fanout_delivery_ms p95' WHEN metric_name = 'viewer_send_ms' THEN 'viewer_send_ms p95' ELSE COALESCE(queue_name, metric_name) END AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('telemetry_transport_send_ms', 'ingest_decode_ms', 'ingest_route_ms', 'symbol_projector_apply_ms', 'run_projector_apply_ms', 'fanout_delivery_ms', 'viewer_send_ms')  AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')  GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: p95 latency across transport, ingest, projector, fanout, and viewer delivery seams.

panels.title: Top Queue Pressure

targets.rawSql: WITH latest AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (COALESCE(m.queue_name, CASE WHEN m.metric_name = 'bootstrap_pending_count' THEN 'bootstrap_pending_slot' ELSE COALESCE(queue_name, metric_name) END), COALESCE(m.run_id, ''), COALESCE(m.series_key, '')) COALESCE(m.queue_name, CASE WHEN m.metric_name = 'bootstrap_pending_count' THEN 'bootstrap_pending_slot' ELSE COALESCE(queue_name, metric_name) END) AS queue_name, COALESCE(m.run_id, '') AS run_id, COALESCE(m.series_key, '') AS series_key, m.value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('telemetry_queue_utilization', 'symbol_fact_queue_utilization', 'run_lifecycle_queue_utilization', 'run_notification_queue_utilization', 'fanout_queue_utilization', 'bootstrap_pending_count')  AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')  ORDER BY COALESCE(m.queue_name, CASE WHEN m.metric_name = 'bootstrap_pending_count' THEN 'bootstrap_pending_slot' ELSE COALESCE(queue_name, metric_name) END), COALESCE(m.run_id, ''), COALESCE(m.series_key, ''), m.observed_at DESC ) SELECT CONCAT(queue_name, CASE WHEN run_id <> '' THEN ' • ' || run_id ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN series_key <> '' THEN ' • ' || series_key ELSE '' END) AS metric, ROUND((max(value) * 100.0)::numeric, 2)::double precision AS value FROM latest GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10;

panels.description: Latest queue occupancy/utilization ranked by hottest queue instance.

panels.title: Top Persistence Wait Times

targets.rawSql: SELECT CONCAT(COALESCE(m.component, 'unknown'), CASE WHEN COALESCE(m.run_id, '') <> '' THEN ' • ' || m.run_id ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN COALESCE(m.series_key, '') <> '' THEN ' • ' || m.series_key ELSE '' END) AS metric, ROUND((percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY m.value))::numeric, 2)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name = 'persistence_wait_ms'  AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')  GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10;

panels.description: p95 wait before persistence work starts, ranked by component/run/series.

panels.title: Snapshot Load / Total Latency Summary

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN metric_name = 'viewer_snapshot_load_ms' THEN 'viewer_snapshot_load_ms p95' WHEN metric_name = 'viewer_snapshot_total_ms' THEN 'viewer_snapshot_total_ms p95' WHEN metric_name = 'db_initial_load_ms' THEN 'db_initial_load_ms p95' WHEN metric_name = 'run_projector_initial_state_load_ms' THEN 'run_projector_initial_state_load_ms p95' ELSE COALESCE(queue_name, metric_name) END AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('viewer_snapshot_load_ms', 'viewer_snapshot_total_ms', 'db_initial_load_ms', 'run_projector_initial_state_load_ms')  AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')  GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: p95 snapshot hydration and initial-state load timings.

panels.title: Recent Event Counts

targets.rawSql: SELECT e.event_name AS metric, count(*)::double precision AS value FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 e WHERE $__timeFilter(e.observed_at)  AND COALESCE(e.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(e.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(e.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')  GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 12;

panels.description: Most frequent structured events in the selected window.

panels.title: Recent Critical Structured Events

targets.rawSql: SELECT e.observed_at AS "Time", e.level, e.event_name, e.run_id, e.series_key, e.component, e.queue_name, e.failure_mode, COALESCE(e.message, e.details::text, '') AS detail FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 e WHERE $__timeFilter(e.observed_at) AND e.level IN ('WARN', 'ERROR')  AND COALESCE(e.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(e.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(e.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(e.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')  ORDER BY e.observed_at DESC LIMIT 75;

panels.description: Structured WARN/ERROR events for fast triage.

panels.title: Recent Warning / Error Logs
panels.description: Backend log stream for recent warning and error lines.

list.name: bot_id
list.label: Bot
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT bot_id AS __value, bot_id AS __text FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT bot_id AS __value, bot_id AS __text FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: run_id
list.label: Run
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT run_id AS __value, run_id AS __text FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1 DESC;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT run_id AS __value, run_id AS __text FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1 DESC;

list.name: series_key
list.label: Series
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT series_key AS __value, series_key AS __text FROM portal_bot_run_view_state WHERE series_key <> '__run__' AND COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT series_key AS __value, series_key AS __text FROM portal_bot_run_view_state WHERE series_key <> '__run__' AND COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: component
list.label: Component
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT component AS __value, component AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(component, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT component AS __value, component AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(component, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: queue_name
list.label: Queue
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT queue_name AS __value, queue_name AS __text FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(queue_name, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT queue_name AS __value, queue_name AS __text FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(queue_name, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: storage_target
list.label: Storage
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT storage_target AS __value, storage_target AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(storage_target, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT storage_target AS __value, storage_target AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(storage_target, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: failure_mode
list.label: Failure
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT failure_mode AS __value, failure_mode AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(failure_mode, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT failure_mode AS __value, failure_mode AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(failure_mode, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

title: BotLens Overview
